---
title: 'Invited Paper: Imaging, Computing, and Human Perception: Three Agents to Usher
  in the Autonomous Machine Computing Era'
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- robotics
- human_perception
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3676536.3697113
journ: ICCAD
year: 2024
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 85
---
